title: VillagerPlus - More Trades - Mason
description: Adds various mod's blocks to the mason trades.
body:
Based on the existing Mason trades provided by Vanilla Minecraft and the importer provided by VillagersPlus, this mod adds several different blocks from the Supplementaries and Let's Do Meadow mods.

## Added Blocks
- Ash Bricks
- Limestone
- Daub

## Required Mods:
- [VillagersPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)
- [Let's Do Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
